statement: In every magma, Equation 2433 (`x = (y * (z * (w * w))) * w`) implies Equation 3105 (`x = (((y * x) * x) * y) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0172
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op w w))) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y x) x) y) x)
